testcase.name: test_generate_with_topic_and_image
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_dashboard_features.py:69: in test_generate_with_topic_and_image assert r.status_code == 200, f"got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:300]}" E AssertionError: got 500: {"detail":{"error":"Generation failed","detail":"Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': 'You uploaded an unsupported image. Please make sure your image is valid.', 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'image_parse_error'}}"}} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
